content.rendered:
Parking Management

Our Services Includes:
  • Preparation of detailed parking policy based on detailed demand assessment
  • Public parking management in the city core and remaining areas along with restrictive parking strategies
  • Preparation of techno-economic feasibility report for proposed new parking developments
  • Bid process management for private management of parking operations
Representative Projects
  • Parking Policies and Parking Master Plans for the cities of Kochi, Nagpur and Panaji
  • Parking Policy and Master Plan for Pimpri- Chinchwad under GEF India- SUTP
  • Parking Management Plan for core city area of Thimphu and technical due diligence for developing parking facility in Thimphu (Bhutan) on PPP basis- IFC (The World Bank Group)
  • Consultancy for development of computerized and automated traffic management system and parking facilities at AIIMS campus, New Delhi
  • Advisory services for developing parking projects at various locations (150) in Mumbai city and suburbs
  • Development of Pedestrian and Parking Policy Framework for Shillong, Meghalaya
